name: app-scaffold
description: Create project structure, build configuration, base Application/App classes, CI setup for both Android (Gradle KTS, version catalog) and iOS (Xcode project, SPM)

name: design-system
description: Material 3 theme (Android) with MoltTheme composable, SwiftUI theme (iOS) with custom ViewModifiers, shared design tokens (colors, typography, spacing, corner radius), common reusable components (MoltButton, MoltTextField, MoltCard, LoadingView, ErrorView, EmptyView)

name: network-layer
description: API client setup: Retrofit + OkHttp + Kotlin Serialization (Android), URLSession + async/await + Codable (iOS). Auth token interceptor/middleware, error response parsing, base URL config from environment, request/response logging in debug mode

name: navigation
description: Type-safe navigation: Compose Navigation with sealed route classes (Android), NavigationStack + NavigationPath + Router (iOS). Tab bar with Home/Categories/Cart/Profile tabs. Deep linking support

name: di-setup
description: Dependency injection: Hilt modules for singletons, ViewModels, repositories (Android). Protocol-based DependencyContainer with lazy initialization (iOS). Network module, storage module, feature module registrations

name: auth-infrastructure
description: Auth token storage (DataStore/Keychain), auth state management (logged in/out/expired), token refresh logic, auth interceptor integration, session management, logout cleanup

name: login-screen
description: Email/password login screen with Material 3 TextField (Android) / SwiftUI TextField (iOS), form validation (email format, password min length), loading state, error display, 'Forgot Password' link, 'Register' link, Medusa POST /auth/customer/emailpass endpoint

name: register-screen
description: Customer registration: first name, last name, email, password, confirm password fields. Form validation, terms checkbox, Medusa POST /auth/customer/emailpass + POST /store/customers endpoints, auto-login after registration

name: forgot-password
description: Password reset flow: enter email screen, verification code entry, new password screen. Medusa POST /store/customers/password-token + POST /store/customers/password endpoints

name: home-screen
description: Home screen with: hero banner carousel (auto-scroll), category chips horizontal scroll, featured products grid (2 columns), 'New Arrivals' section, pull-to-refresh. Medusa GET /store/products, GET /store/product-categories endpoints

name: category-browsing
description: Category list screen: grid of category cards with images and names. Subcategory navigation. Category detail showing products filtered by category. Medusa GET /store/product-categories, GET /store/products?category_id[] endpoints

name: product-list
description: Product list with grid (2 col) / list toggle, product cards (image, title, price, vendor name, rating), infinite scroll pagination (offset-based), pull-to-refresh, sort options (price asc/desc, newest, popular), filter chips. Medusa GET /store/products with limit/offset/order params

name: product-detail
description: Product detail screen: image gallery with horizontal pager/dots, product title, price (with sale price strikethrough), variant selector (size/color), vendor info card (name, rating, link to store), description (expandable), specifications table, 'Add to Cart' sticky bottom button, share button. Medusa GET /store/products/:id endpoint

name: product-search
description: Search screen: search bar with debounced input, search suggestions/autocomplete, recent searches (local storage), search results grid (reuse ProductList), empty state for no results, clear search. Medusa GET /store/products?q= endpoint

name: cart
description: Cart screen: list of cart items (image, title, variant, price, quantity stepper), swipe-to-delete, cart summary (subtotal, shipping estimate, total), 'Proceed to Checkout' button, empty cart state. Medusa cart endpoints: POST /store/carts, POST /store/carts/:id/line-items, DELETE /store/carts/:id/line-items/:line_id, POST /store/carts/:id/line-items/:line_id (update quantity)

name: wishlist
description: Wishlist/favorites: heart icon toggle on product cards and detail, wishlist screen showing saved products grid, remove from wishlist, local storage persistence (no backend endpoint needed initially), empty state

name: address-management
description: Address management: list of saved addresses, add new address form (name, street, city, state, postal code, country, phone), edit address, delete address, set default. Medusa GET/POST/DELETE /store/customers/me/addresses endpoints

name: checkout-address
description: Checkout step 1 - Shipping address: select from saved addresses or add new, address validation, continue to shipping. Medusa POST /store/carts/:id (update shipping_address)

name: checkout-shipping
description: Checkout step 2 - Shipping method: list available shipping options with prices and estimated delivery, select shipping option. Medusa GET /store/shipping-options?cart_id=, POST /store/carts/:id/shipping-methods

name: checkout-payment
description: Checkout step 3 - Payment: order summary, select payment provider, enter payment details (or saved card), place order button. Medusa POST /store/payment-collections/:id/payment-sessions, POST /store/carts/:id/complete

name: order-confirmation
description: Order confirmation screen: success animation/icon, order number, order summary, estimated delivery, 'Continue Shopping' button, 'View Order' button. Navigate here after successful checkout

name: order-list
description: My Orders list: tabs (All, Processing, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled), order cards (order number, date, status badge, total, item count, first item image), infinite scroll. Medusa GET /store/orders with status filter

name: order-detail
description: Order detail screen: order status timeline/stepper, item list with images, shipping address, payment method, price breakdown (subtotal, shipping, tax, discount, total), tracking info (if shipped), 'Cancel Order' button (if cancellable), 'Return Item' button (if delivered). Medusa GET /store/orders/:id

name: user-profile
description: User profile screen: avatar, name, email, phone. Edit profile form. Change password. Medusa GET /store/customers/me, POST /store/customers/me endpoints

name: payment-methods
description: Saved payment methods: list of cards (masked number, brand icon, expiry), add new card, delete card, set default. Integration depends on payment provider setup

name: notifications
description: Notifications screen: list of notifications (order updates, promotions), read/unread state, notification detail. Push notification setup (Firebase FCM for Android, APNs for iOS), in-app notification badge on tab bar

name: settings
description: Settings screen: language selection (TR/EN), theme (light/dark/system), notification preferences toggles, about/version info, terms & conditions link, privacy policy link, logout button, delete account

name: product-reviews
description: Product reviews: review list on product detail (star rating, text, user name, date), write review form (star rating picker, text field, photo upload), review summary (average rating, rating distribution bar chart). Backend review endpoints

name: vendor-store-page
description: Vendor store page: vendor banner, logo, name, description, rating, product count. Vendor's products grid (reuse ProductList filtered by vendor). Follow/unfollow vendor. Medusa GET /store/vendors/:id (custom), GET /store/products?vendor_id=

name: product-qna
description: Product Q&A: question list on product detail, ask question form, answer display, vendor answers highlighted. Backend Q&A endpoints (custom)

name: recently-viewed
description: Recently viewed products: horizontal scroll on home screen, dedicated screen, local storage tracking (last 50 products), clear history option

name: price-alerts
description: Price alerts: 'Set Price Alert' button on product detail, target price input, alert management screen, push notification when price drops. Backend price-alert endpoints (custom)

name: share-product
description: Share product: share button on product detail, native share sheet (Android Intent.ACTION_SEND, iOS UIActivityViewController via ShareLink), deep link generation for shared products

name: app-onboarding
description: App onboarding: 3-4 page horizontal pager on first launch, illustrations + text explaining app features, skip button, 'Get Started' button on last page, shown only once (local flag)
